THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEER TRADING LLC. DBA CORE CONNECT COMPUTERS $27,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $600.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,100.00, INTEREST SHALL ACCRUE AT THE STATUTORY RATE FROM JULY 25, 2019 - SEE SCANNED DOC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC SHALL RECOVER THE FOLLOWING SUMS AS REFLECTED INTHE FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD: 1.) AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC SHALL RECOVER REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE SUM OF $27,500; 2.) CORE CONNECT SHALL REIMBURSE AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC IN THE SUM OF $600, REPRESENTING TH EPORTION OF AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION FEES IN EXCESS OF THE APPORTIONED COSTS PREVIOUSLY INCURRED AND PAID BY AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC; 3.) INTEREST SHALL ACCRUE AT THE STATUTORY RATE FROM JULY 25, 2019, THE DATE OF THE ARBITRATOR'S ISSUANCE OF THE FINAL AWARD. (SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT")

ORDER GRANTING AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER GRANTING AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-17-2020 HEARING RE: PETITIONER AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED JUDGMENT WHICH RECITES ALL THE TERMS OF RELIEF MADE IN THE ARBITRATION AWARD AND MUST EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600 MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MONDER KHOURY, Esq. of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP (Tel: 415-276-6500) for petitioner Amazon.Com Services LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC's Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare a proposed judgment which recites all the terms of relief made in the arbitration award and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC's Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment: Grant. No opposition filed.

Order and judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
